## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.10.3

### 🎥 Cameras
- Adds a recovery path for cameras that appear after Home Assistant has already loaded the camera platform.
- Prevents unsupported direct `webrtc://` stream URLs from being handed to Home Assistant's stream worker.

### 🎞️ Recordings
- Registers the X-Sense Recordings runtime when cameras become available after startup.
- Keeps recordings cleanup in place for accounts without X-Sense cameras.
